landing.title: Summer, water, competition: join the tournament in Elten.
landing.subtitle: Everything about matches, teams, and contact in one place - fast, clear, and mobile friendly.
landing.event_location_value: Field at Haagsche Straße 2, 46446 Emmerich am Rhein
landing.route_hint: Opens Google Maps and starts navigation to the tournament location.
landing.card_one_text: Stay up to date with fixtures, time slots, and matchups on one central page.
landing.card_two_text: Enjoy fair competition, sporting ambition, and real tournament energy around the pool.
landing.card_three_text: Questions about registration or organization? Reach out directly through the contact page.
